summary.summary: Imported via zip fallback, file count: 926

core_modules.description: Primary dataset ingestion entrypoints; best import-level integration surface for MCP tools that need to open user data and dispatch to frontend-specific handlers.
Core dataset abstraction shared across frontends; central object for metadata access, indexing, fields, and data container generation.
Base data container APIs used by regions/spheres/rays and field extraction workflows.
Selection-object base layer for geometric querying and field sampling; useful for MCP operations over selected subregions.
Derived-field definition and execution model; key extension point for custom scientific diagnostics.
Field registration/discovery container; can power MCP field introspection endpoints.
2D plotting surface for common analysis outputs; suitable for MCP render/export tool calls.
Profile/phase plotting classes for quick diagnostic plotting endpoints.
Volume rendering scene graph abstraction; optional advanced visualization integration point.
Internal command-line implementation module (subcommands for yt CLI tooling), useful as CLI fallback but less stable than direct imports.

cli_commands.name: yt
cli_commands.description: Primary CLI entrypoint family for dataset inspection and utility workflows; command names are implemented in this module.
